caption: A man wearing a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" in gold lettering and a white baseball cap sits in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone attached to a boom arm. To his left, a white backdrop features repeating gold stars and the word "HUSTLE." In the background, a blue banner reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug with red and white text that includes "TALK OUT" is visible on the table. A small logo featuring "TALK" inside a red circle appears in the lower-left corner. Across the sequence, the man remains seated and maintains a consistent posture, looking slightly to his left with a neutral facial expression, while the lighting and composition of the scene remain static.
